name: reality-composer-pro
description: Codex plugin for Apple Reality Composer Pro, RealityKit, visionOS spatial-content workflows, USD assets, and RCP editor-extension development.

interface.shortDescription: Reality Composer Pro, RealityKit, visionOS, USD assets, and editor-plugin workflows.
interface.longDescription: Use Codex as a high-autonomy Apple Reality Composer Pro expert with skills, local MCP tools, official-reference lookup, project inspection, asset auditing, Swift/RealityKit scaffolding, custom RCP editor-plugin guidance, and safe implementation planning for visionOS and iOS spatial content.
